scripts.build: npm run build --workspace @hanzi-learning-app/shared && npm run build --workspace @hanzi-learning-app/api && npm run build --workspace @hanzi-learning-app/web
scripts.typecheck: npm run build --workspace @hanzi-learning-app/shared && npm run typecheck --workspace @hanzi-learning-app/api && npm run typecheck --workspace @hanzi-learning-app/web
scripts.lint: npm run lint --workspace @hanzi-learning-app/shared && npm run lint --workspace @hanzi-learning-app/api && npm run lint --workspace @hanzi-learning-app/web
